input.placeholderDefault: Describe your task... (⌘+V to paste images)
input.send: Send (Enter to send, Option/Alt+Enter for newline)
input.templates.label: Templates
input.templates.title: Pick a starting point from the task template library
input.templates.heading: Task templates (click to fill the composer)
taskTemplates.explain.label: Explain this code
taskTemplates.explain.desc: Walk through purpose, design, and callers
taskTemplates.explain.prompt:
Please explain the core purpose, design intent, and typical callers of the following code:

```
[paste code here]
```
taskTemplates.trace.label: Trace call chain
taskTemplates.trace.desc: Follow the key path from an entry point
taskTemplates.trace.prompt: Trace the key call chain of [describe feature/entry point] starting from its entry (HTTP / CLI / event). List every hop as file:line with its role, then suggest where to add logs or breakpoints.
taskTemplates.debug.label: Investigate a bug
taskTemplates.debug.prompt:
I'm seeing the following bug. Please:
1. Give a minimal repro
2. Locate the most likely root cause (cite file:line)
3. Propose 1-2 candidate fixes with trade-offs

Observed: [describe]
Expected: [describe]
Logs/errors: [paste]
taskTemplates.refactor.label: Refactor this code
taskTemplates.refactor.prompt:
Refactor the following code. Goal: [split responsibilities / extract helpers / change pattern]. Constraint: keep public API stable, no new dependencies. Outline the plan first, then apply changes.

```
[paste code here]
```
taskTemplates.tests.label: Add unit tests
taskTemplates.tests.prompt:
Write unit tests for the following code: 1 happy path + ≥2 edge cases + ≥1 error path. List the cases first, then produce the code.

Target: [paste code or file path]
taskTemplates.review.label: Review changes
taskTemplates.review.prompt:
Act as a senior reviewer for the following changes. Cover: correctness (logic / edge cases), readability (naming, structure, comments), performance & concurrency, security (injection, authz, leaks). Tag each issue (must-fix / suggestion / nit) with the smallest fix.

Changes: [paste diff or file path]
taskTemplates.docs.label: Write usage docs
taskTemplates.docs.prompt:
Based on the following code/module, write a usage doc for newcomers: when to use → core API → a minimal runnable example → known limitations.

Module: [name or file path]
taskTemplates.adr.label: Capture an ADR
taskTemplates.adr.prompt: Capture the technical decision we just made as an ADR with sections: title / status / context / decision / consequences (pros + cons) / alternatives & trade-offs. Topic: [short description]

toolCall.errorDiagnosis.contextStale.hin: Run file_view on the target file first, then regenerate old_str and line anchors based on the latest content.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.modelInput.hint: Tool parameters or anchors do not match the current file. Re-read the file and generate new edit parameters.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.roleConstraint.h: The orchestrator should not perform this operation directly. Delegate to a Worker with structured Assignment Dispatch JSON.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.policy.hint: This tool call does not satisfy the active execution contract. Adjust routing, execution mode, or target path instead of retrying the same call.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.modelOutput.hint: The file_edit submodel did not return a complete file payload in the required protocol. Narrow the edit scope, provide clearer anchors, or switch to file_insert / file_create for deterministic changes.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.workspaceWrite.h: The model already produced content, but VSCode workspace apply/save failed. Check file locks, save hooks, formatters, or external processes rewriting the file.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.permission.hint: This operation was blocked by the authorization policy. Grant permission before retrying.
toolCall.errorDiagnosis.runtime.hint: The tool failed during execution. Check executor logs or external environment (save, format, process rewrite).

dispatch.audit.appendix.strictFollow: Strictly follow the audit results above in your summary. Do not downgrade "intervention" items.
dispatch.audit.issue.parallelConflict: Parallel conflict with task {taskId} on file {file} (no dependency serialization)
dispatch.audit.phaseCInterventionBlocked: Phase C audit found intervention issues; auto delivery blocked
dispatch.audit.reactiveInterventionBlock: Reactive orchestration audit found intervention issues; auto delivery blocked
dispatch.audit.report.action1: 1. Add follow-up fix tasks for intervention items (recommend serialization and supplement contracts.freeze_files / depends_on)
dispatch.audit.report.action2: 2. Re-run before entering Phase C summary
dispatch.audit.report.resultBlocked: Result: intervention issues detected, automatic delivery blocked.
dispatch.batch.resetCancelReason: Starting a new execution cycle; clearing leftover tasks from previous cycle
dispatch.delegation.executionRequirement:
## Execution Requirements
Finish analysis and solution judgment first, then implement and verify; do not mechanically copy scripts.
dispatch.errors.acceptanceConstraintsCon: acceptance / constraints / context must be arrays with at least one non-empty string
dispatch.errors.dispatchCategoryMissing: dispatchTaskCategories missing taskId={taskId}; dispatch registration data is inconsistent
dispatch.errors.categoryOwnershipMismatc: Category {category} is inconsistent with the current task's ownership semantics (task domains: {taskDomains}; user goal domains: {promptDomains}). Split or rewrite the Assignment according to the user goal before dispatching again
dispatch.errors.categoryOwnershipSplitRe: Category {category} currently spans multiple ownership domains {domains}. Split it into multiple ownership-specific Assignments before dispatching
dispatch.errors.integrationPhaseRequired: An integration Assignment must not absorb frontend/backend feature work before a real phase handoff when no depends_on is provided. Dispatch frontend/backend ownership tasks first, then use integration for hookup, alignment, or final validation after they finish. If this is an existing-system integration issue, make the existing dependencies or already-built capabilities explicit in the task
dispatch.errors.integrationPhaseMustRunL: An integration Assignment must not be registered in the same active batch as frontend/backend feature tasks. Finish the current ownership phase first, then dispatch integration in a later round against real completed predecessor tasks
dispatch.errors.ownershipSplitRequired: Category {category} is only a fallback category, but the task matches multiple ownership domains {domains}. Split it into multiple Assignments and choose a more specific category for each one before dispatching again
dispatch.errors.readOnlyPromptRejectsMod: The current user request is explicitly read-only/planning-only; dispatching a modifying task with requires_modification=true is not allowed
dispatch.errors.workerWaitWithoutActiveB: There is no active Assignment batch to wait for. Produce valid Assignment Dispatch JSON first; the runtime will dispatch and wait internally.
dispatch.errors.workerWaitUnknownTasks: Worker wait task_ids are not part of the current active batch: {taskIds}
dispatch.errors.writeTaskRequiresGitWork: Write tasks require a Git workspace (isolated worktree). Current workspace is not a Git repository: {workspaceRoot}
dispatch.errors.splitDepthExceeded: Maximum split depth reached (3 levels), cannot split further
dispatch.errors.taskNameOrGoalRequired: task_name or goal must provide at least one non-empty string
dispatch.lane.description: Note: this queue is a real-time snapshot. Later tasks for the same Worker will be merged into this card.
dispatch.notify.runtimeExecutionFailover: Task {taskId} detected that {fromWorker} became temporarily unavailable during execution ({reason}); automatically downgraded to {toWorker} to continue
dispatch.notify.dependsOnDroppedCrossSes: Task {taskId} has {count} depends_on entries from another session; ignored ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.dependsOnDroppedUnfinish: Task {taskId} has {count} historical depends_on entries not completed; ignored and continued ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.dependsOnDroppedUnknown: Task {taskId} has {count} unresolved depends_on entries; ignored and continued ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.dependsOnResolvedHistory: Task {taskId} has {count} historical depends_on entries already completed; treated as satisfied ({dependencies})
dispatch.notify.nonGitWriteSerialized: Git isolation is unavailable in the current workspace; write tasks have been downgraded to correlation-based serial mode
dispatch.notify.nonGitWriteSerializedRea: non-Git workspace; downgraded to correlation-based serial mode
dispatch.notify.nonGitWriteSerializedTas: Task {taskId} detected no Git isolation in the current workspace; automatically added {count} correlated write-task dependencies and downgraded to serial execution
dispatch.notify.nonGitCorrelationSeriali: non-Git workspace correlation scheduling; added {count} dependencies ({reasons})
dispatch.notify.parallelScopeHintMissing: Task {taskId} is missing scope_hint; automatically added {count} dependencies and downgraded to serial execution
dispatch.notify.ownershipCategoryWarning: Task {taskId} has category {category} that conflicts with ownership signals: {details}
dispatch.notify.ownershipFallbackSingleD: Fallback category {fromCategory} was automatically rewritten to {toCategory} based on the clear ownership domain {domains}
dispatch.notify.ownershipInferredSingleD: Category {fromCategory} was normalized to ownership route {toCategory} based on the clear domain signal {domains}
dispatch.notify.ownershipFallbackSingleD: fallback category {category} overrides a clear domain signal {domains}
The task clearly matches domain {domains}; prefer that specific category instead of {category}
dispatch.notify.ownershipFallbackMultiDo: fallback category {category} is carrying a multi-domain task {domains}
The task matches multiple ownership domains {domains}; split it into multiple Assignments before dispatching instead of using {category} directly
dispatch.notify.routingAdjusted: Task rerouted: requested category {category}, actual worker {selectedWorker} ({routingReason})
dispatch.phaseBPlus.blockingDecisionFail: Failed to decide on blocking issue, degraded to continue: {error}
dispatch.phaseBPlus.blockingNoDecision: Blocking issue did not receive a valid decision, degraded to continue: {question}
dispatch.phaseBPlus.prompt:
Worker {workerId} encountered an issue during execution and needs a decision:

## Worker Report
{question}

## Current Batch Status
{batchStatus}

## Original User Requirement
{userPrompt}

Please decide:
1. If you can provide clear instructions to continue, provide them
2. If additional workers are needed, output structured Assignment Dispatch JSON; the runtime will dispatch and wait internally
3. If user intervention is required, explain it
dispatch.phaseC.fallbackNotice: Summary model call failed. Raw results from workers are shown below
dispatch.phaseC.progressMessage: Summarizing execution results from all workers...
dispatch.reactiveSummary.header: Worker phase completed (auto summary): total {total}, success {completed}, failed {failed}, skipped {skipped}, cancelled {cancelled}.
dispatch.scopeHint.footer: Prefer locating from these hints first, but naturally expand scope if needed.
dispatch.waitForWorkers.timeout: Worker wait idle timeout ({seconds}s), {pendingCount} tasks still pending
engine.errors.orchestrationRequiredButNo: This request explicitly requires task orchestration, but no valid Assignment was created in the round. The round must not be treated as completed; split and dispatch tasks before finishing.
engine.errors.turnSwitchedMissionInvalid: Execution turn switched, execution group creation result is invalid
engine.input.emptyPrompt: Please enter your requirement or question.
engine.phaseC.interventionBlocked: Phase C audit found intervention issues; auto delivery blocked. Add fixes per audit suggestions and retry.
engine.delivery.autoRepairProgressMessag: Acceptance failed. Starting auto repair round {round}/{maxRounds}.
engine.delivery.autoRepairStalled: Auto repair stopped after {streak}/{threshold} rounds without progress.
engine.governance.autoResumeScheduled: Recoverable gate detected. Auto retry in {seconds}s (round {round}/{maxRounds}, reason: {reason}).
engine.governance.advice.budget_exceeded: Increase budget or split tasks, then retry.
engine.governance.advice.external_wait_t: Verify external dependencies and retry when ready.
engine.governance.advice.stalled: Provide more constraints or actionable steps to unblock progress.
engine.governance.advice.upstream_model_: Check model/config availability or retry later.
engine.governance.advice.unknown: Review logs and retry after confirmation.
engine.followUp.blockedNotice:
[System] Pending execution items require external input or were blocked by the system. Auto follow-up has been stopped. Please resolve the following blockers and retry:
{items}

pipeline.forceChange.modifyAnyTarget: You must modify and save at least one of these files: {files}.

pipeline.forceChange.noActualModificatio: You previously made no actual modifications to target files.
pipeline.forceChange.noPlanOnly: Do not provide explanation or plan only. You must edit files via tools and save before outputting results.

stream.recovery.continuationPrompt:
[System] The previous output was interrupted during transmission (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Here is the last fragment before interruption:
"{tail}"
Please continue immediately after the fragment above without repeating any existing content.
stream.recovery.continuationPromptNoTail: [System] The previous output was interrupted during transmission (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue from where the output left off without repeating.
stream.recovery.toolCallWithText: [System] The previous round was interrupted during tool call phase (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue from existing output; if tools are needed, re-emit the complete tool_call with full arguments. Do not repeat prior text.
stream.recovery.toolCallOnly: [System] The previous round was interrupted during tool call phase (network fluctuation). Auto-recovery ({attempt}/{max}). Please continue the current task; if tools are still needed, re-emit the complete tool_call with full arguments.
